name: paypal-cli-workshop
description: AI Engineer SF — Agentic CLI Workshop

scripts.brew:as-agent: WORKSHOP_AGENT_MODE=1 node node-cli/src/index.js brew-solution 2>events.jsonl & cat events.jsonl
scripts.workshop:start: node scripts/preflight.js --fix && concurrently --names "quest,leaderboard" "npm run start:quest" "npm run start:leaderboard"
